This applies to everyone, even non-members. It's alright to joke around and criticize, but attacking people is not allowed at all.
Please don't attempt to start drama or bring drama into this server. It's stressful for the involved parties and moderators and is unnecessary.
If the channel you're writing in has a special topic, please follow that topic. Some channels, like <#1270778066884624517>, are a wild card and anything could be discussed there.
rules.4. Doxxing: Do not share the personal information of anyone. Not even yourself. The internet is a scary place, we don't want anyone to get hurt.
rules.5. Hate speech: As with rule 1, everyone should be treated with respect. Bigotry (racism, sexism, transphobia, homophobia, etc.) is not allowed at all.
rules.6. Spam: Please don't send repetitive messages, media, emojis, stickers, or bot commands.
rules.7. Pings:
Please respect people's ping preference. If they clearly state that they don't want to be pinged, don't ping them.
We have roles for peoples reply ping preferences, if you want to add one of those roles to your profile, check out <id:customize>.
rules.8. NSFW Content: NSFW content is not allowed, under any circumstance.
rules.9. Maturity: While it's alright to be a little silly, we ask that you act with some maturity and leave the childish behavior.

notes: For most rule breaches, for example, breaking rule 9, you will receive a warning. After 2 warnings a stronger punishment may be enacted. Warnings expire after 2 months. Breaking some rules, like rule 4, may result in an immediate ban.
Punishments are entirely up to the moderator(s), and can be for any reason.
